PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORTEZ, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAVOOSI, KAVOOS YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC., DBA YELLOW CAB COMPANY $19,025.77 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,025.77, THE CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT DIANA GOLDMAN IS DENIED; CLAIM OF CROSS-COMPLAINANT DIANA GOLDMAN AGAINST CROSS-DEFENDANTS YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. AND KAVOOS KAVOOSI IS DENIED; THE CLAIM OF CROSS-COMPLAINANTS YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. AND KAVOOS KAVOOSI AGAINST CROSS-COMPLAINANT DIANA GOLDMAN IS DENIED. EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR ITS OWN COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT, AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, DATED FEB-04-2013.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORTEZ, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT KAVOOSI, KAVOOS YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC., DBA YELLOW CAB COMPANY

MINI MINUTES: Arbitration Order to Show Cause.
Appearances: Mr. Joe Bautista for Plaintiff Robert Cortez.
Mr. Paul Ota Esq. for Defendant Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc, et al

The Parties advise the Court that more time is needed to schedule arbitration. The Court orders that the arbitration jurisdiction is extended 120 days to 10-10-2012. The Order to Show Cause re Arbitration shall be continued to 11-13-2012 at 2:00 pm in Department 610. Court to send notice.

Visiting Judge Wallace Douglas (Retired), Clerk Melinka Jones, Not Reported. (610)
